dc_description: A street-level view from behind bicycle handlebars shows a paved urban road curving alongside a long historic stone wall with crenellations. Behind the wall is a large domed church-like structure. Cars and a van are visible on the road, with one blue car blurred in the left foreground from motion. A tree, streetlights, sidewalks, and low buildings line the right side under a clear blue sky.
novel_visual_observations: The foreground bicycle handlebar and brake lever are out of focus, indicating the camera is positioned very close to or on a bicycle.
The stone wall on the left has castle-like battlements, while the domed roof behind it suggests a historic religious or civic complex.
rich_context: Viale Raniero Capocci, La Quercia, Viterbo, Lazio, 01100, Italia
